nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Ficedula
nodes.summary: Ficedula（Ficedula）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联34种鸟类，如白眉姬鶲、綠背姬鶲、黄眉姬鹟等34种鸟类。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Lompobattang flycatcher
nodes.summary: The Lompobattang flycatcher (Ficedula bonthaina), also spelt Lompobatang flycatcher, is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is endemic to the Indonesia island of Sulawesi. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
